drl:
rule "R0"
when
    T0(f0 != true, $b0_0_0 : f2)
    T1(f0 != false, $b0_1_0 : f1, $b0_1_1 : f0)
    T1(f0 == true, f1 != true)
then
end
rule "R1"
no-loop
when
    $p1_0 : T0(f0 != false, $b1_0_0 : f2, $b1_0_1 : f1)
then
    delete($p1_0);
end
rule "R2"
when
    T1(f1 == false, $b2_0_0 : f1)
    T1($b2_1_0 : f1, $b2_1_1 : f0)
then
end
rule "R3"
when
    $p3_0 : T0($b3_0_0 : f0, f0 == false)
then
    insert(new T1(true, false));
    insert(new T1($p3_0.isF0(), $p3_0.isF0()));
    $p3_0.setF0(true);
    $p3_0.setF2($p3_0.getF2());
    $p3_0.setF1(100);
    update($p3_0);
end
rule "R4"
when
    T1(f1 == true, f1 != true, $b4_0_0 : f0, $b4_0_1 : f0)
then
end
